mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, policy_type, version, locale, source, request_ip, user_agent, accepted_at FROM user_policy_accept_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, user_id, device_uid, platform, push_channel, push_token, app_version, status, last_active_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_device WHERE device_uid = #{deviceUid} FOR UPDATE
SELECT id, user_id, device_uid, platform, push_channel, push_token, app_version, status, last_active_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_device WHERE id = #{deviceId} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, device_uid, platform, push_channel, push_token, app_version, status, last_active_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_device WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY last_active_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_device SET user_id = #{userId}, platform = #{platform}, push_channel = #{pushChannel}, push_token = #{pushToken}, app_version = #{appVersion}, status = 1, last_active_at = #{lastActiveAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE user_device SET push_channel = #{pushChannel}, push_token = #{pushToken}, app_version = #{appVersion}, status = 1, last_active_at = #{lastActiveAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_device SET push_channel = 0, push_token = '', status = 3, last_active_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{deviceId} AND user_id = #{userId}
